projectDescription: A collection of Google-provided Apache Beam pipeline templates for streaming and batch data movement between Google Cloud services and external systems.
keyFeatures: 50+ pre-built streaming and batch pipeline templates
Apache Beam-powered pipelines on Google Cloud Dataflow
Flex Templates (v2) for containerized, parameterized pipelines
YAML Templates for declarative pipeline definitions
Python Templates for ML and analytics workloads
User-Defined Functions (UDFs) via JavaScript for custom transformations
Terraform module generation for infrastructure-as-code deployments
Templates Maven Plugin for staging, running, and testing templates
Integration with BigQuery, Bigtable, Spanner, Pub/Sub, GCS, Kafka, Elasticsearch, and more
Automatic documentation and parameter spec generation
publicApiSurface: @Template annotation — declares a Dataflow template with name, category, description, and options class
@TemplateParameter.{Type} annotations — defines typed, validated pipeline parameters (Text, GcsReadFile, GcsWriteFolder, Boolean, Integer, Enum, etc.)
@TemplateIntegrationTest annotation — wires integration test classes to templates
TemplateCategory enum — GET_STARTED, BATCH, STREAMING, UTILITIES
mvn -PtemplatesStage — stages a template to GCS and Artifact Registry
mvn -PtemplatesRun — stages and runs a template on Dataflow
mvn -PtemplatesTerraform — generates Terraform modules for templates
mvn -PtemplatesSpec — generates documentation and parameter specs
mvn -PtemplatesRelease — executes a full release of all templates
mvn -PtemplatesIntegrationTests — runs integration tests against live Dataflow
UDF transform(inJson) JavaScript function contract — input/output string transformation
